title: HookProgressEvent
description: Represents the progress of a hook invocation.

HookTypeName.description: The type name of the hook.

HookTypeVersionId.description: The version of the hook type.

HookTypeArn.description: The ARN of the hook type.

InvocationPoint.description: The point in the provisioning workflow where the hook runs.

HookStatus.description: The status of the hook invocation.

HookEventTime.description: The time the hook event occurred.

HookStatusMessage.description: A message about the hook status.

FailureMode.description: How the hook failure should affect the overall operation.
